name: BBTRSupport
short: Trading Ranch support ticket bridge for Red-bot
description: Links Discord to the Trading Ranch WordPress support ticket system via REST API. Anyone in the server can open a ticket, staff reply in threads, everything syncs both ways.
install_msg:
After installing, run:
1. `[p]trsupport setchannel #your-channel`
2. `[p]trsupport setsecret <key>` (from WP Admin → TR Support → Settings)
3. `[p]trsupport setstaffrole @YourStaffRole`
4. `[p]trsupport ping` to verify the connection.
author: Trading Ranch
